name: fact-supersession-budget
description: User states a budget, later revises it upward. Two Fact envelopes on the same (subject, predicate) key — the second must supersede the first by (namespace|subject|predicate) compaction key. Recall must return the revised value.

conversation.content: My ceiling for the Lapa apartment is 750,000 EUR.
Noted — targeting listings up to 750k in Lapa.
Actually I can stretch to 820k if the finish is worth it.

recall_queries.query: what is this user's budget for the Lapa apartment
